name: Corn Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the grated cheddar cheese, chopped green chiles, baking powder, minced garlic, oil, cream-style corn, cornmeal, and minced onion.
2. Stir in the milk and beaten eggs until well mixed.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 to 45 minutes, or until the casserole is set and lightly browned on top.
